name: Charter Concierge
description: A self-contained ABL example for Charter Communications style telecom support and sales orchestration across internet, WiFi, mobile, billing, policy, troubleshooting, authentication, and human transfer.

Charter_Concierge_Supervisor.description: Top-level router for service recommendations, setup readiness, troubleshooting, policy questions, and live support transfer.

Charter_Intake_Agent.description: Reasoning-based intake specialist for internet, WiFi, mobile, and bundle recommendation requests.

Offer_Analyst.description: Hybrid deterministic-plus-reasoning specialist that turns a selected offer into a structured recommendation.

Setup_Readiness_Collector.description: Deterministic setup and activation readiness flow using entity-backed field normalization.

Policy_Advisor.description: Reasoning specialist for service policies, eligibility rules, and pricing boundary explanations.

Human_Support_Transfer.description: Deterministic callback and live support transfer flow.

Connectivity_Advisor.description: Reasoning specialist for current plan summaries, troubleshooting context, and material service changes.

Authentication_Agent.description: Deterministic authentication flow for account-specific billing and support actions.

Billing_Care_Agent.description: Hybrid billing specialist for bill explanations, low-risk credits, and supervisor review routing.
